title: Dreighton
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Dreighton_planet.jpg]] |name=Dreighton |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Dantus sector/Legends|Dantus sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] as defined by the [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. |sector=[[Dreighton Nebula/Legends|Dreighton Nebula]], [[Dantus sector/Legends|Dantus sector]] |system=[[Dreighton system/Legends|Dreighton system]] |coordinates=J-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*[[Desert/Legends|Desert]] *Rocks |water= |interest=[[Imperial mining base]] |flora= |fauna=[[Sand leech]]''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' |otherlife= |species=None |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|Stay alert, we lost a patrol in this sector three days ago. I've also got a funny feeling about those TIEs we encountered."
"I know, me too. There's no way they could've gotten from the freighter to us so quickly.|[[Kirby]] and [[Rookie One]] shortly after a TIE attack near Dreighton|''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]''}} '''Dreighton''' was a desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]] littered with rocks. There was an [[Imperial mining base|Imperial facility]] located on the planet. Below it, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] built a huge network of pipe lines and mining tunnels spanning kilometers beneath the surface. Above the planet, [[Rookie One]] and [[Kirby]] were hailed by the ''[[Corellia Star]]'' while being attacked by TIEs. Moving to investigate, they were initially [[Battle in the Dreighton system|engaged]] by regular [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] near the planet; Soon after the first attack, thinking themselves safe, [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantoms]] appeared, disabling Rookie One and destroying Kirby's B-wing. Having no other means to escape the planet, Rookie One entered the Imperial facility and fought his way through, eventually reaching the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] transport ''Corellia Star''. He escaped the base by flying through mining tunnels and delivered it to the Alliance fleet. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{GalaxyCite|5|Game Room|Game Room: Rebel Rouser}} *{{InsiderCite|27|LucasArts Update|Excerpts from the Journal of a Rebel Pilot}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Dreighton }} [[Category:Dantus sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]]
